data.title: AscendEX will launch Avail (AVAIL)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch Avail (AVAIL) at 20:00 on February 18, opening the AVAIL/USDT trading pair, and deposits are now open.

data.title: BitMart will launch SHELL, GPS and BROCCOLI perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BitMart will launch MyShell (SHELL), GoPlus Security (GPS) and CZ'S Dog (BROCCOLI) perpetual contracts at 17:00 (UTC+8) on February 18, 2025. At that time, SHELL/USDT, GPS/USDT and ROCCOLI/USDT trading pairs will be opened. SHELL and GPS support up to 20 times leverage, and BROCCOLI supports up to 50 times leverage.

data.title: Poll: Japan's GDP growth rate will accelerate to 1.3% in 2025
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the Nikkei Chinese website, the results of the forecasts of Japan's gross domestic product (GDP) by 10 private economists interviewed showed that the average forecast for 2025, excluding the impact of price changes, actually increased by 1.3% over the previous year. Personal consumption will pick up and equipment investment will also increase. However, if domestic prices in Japan continue to rise or the overseas economy slows down further, it may have a negative impact on the Japanese economy. (Jinshi)

data.title: Senior UN official urges study on whether cryptocurrencies can help human development
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Kanni Wignaraja, assistant secretary-general of the United Nations, said on Monday that Bitcoin and Ethereum have gained attention as alternative investments, and the overall market value of cryptocurrencies peaked at $3.9 trillion in December last year. Given this huge pool of funds, she suggested investigating whether a small portion of the wealth could be repurposed to support education, health care, skills development and job creation.
Wignaraja called for a new regulatory approach. She stressed that cryptocurrencies need to support human development without endangering financial stability. It is also recommended that development organizations test cryptocurrency funds under strict safeguards to assess their impact.
Wignaraja pointed out that CBDC trials are underway in several Asian countries, and digital currencies provide a safe alternative to cash. CBDC can help bring unbanked people into the formal financial system, which can promote economic inclusion and expand access to financial services.
In addition, she believes that the transparency of blockchain can enhance accountability and curb corruption. To achieve this vision, she suggested that the United Nations Development Program (UNDP) support national institutions to establish a supervisory and risk management framework for CBDC.

data.title: Bitcoin Volatility Reaches Multi-Year Lows
data.description: According to Odaily, data from Glassnode reveals that Bitcoin's two-week realized volatility has decreased to an annualized rate of 32%, marking one of the lowest levels in recent years. Additionally, the one-month implied volatility for options, which reflects market expectations for four-week volatility, has fallen below an annualized rate of 50%, also reaching one of the lowest points in years.
